title: bidens cordifolia
intro: Bidens cordifolia, also known as Heartleaf or Beggar's Tick, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its distinctive heart-shaped leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Bidens cordifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting immune function. Bidens cordifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
